description: Benchmark tests for task-planner skill - OpenSpec task decomposition

evals.name: basic-task-decomposition
evals.prompt: 将以下功能分解为任务: 添加用户认证功能，包括登录、注册、密码重置

assertions.name: generates_task_list
assertions.description: Should generate a list of tasks

evals.name: complexity-assessment-small
evals.prompt: 评估复杂度: 修改一个 typo，影响 1 个文件

evals.name: complexity-assessment-large
evals.prompt: 评估复杂度: 重构 API 架构，影响 10+ 文件，涉及 3 个模块

assertions.name: assesses_as_large
assertions.description: Should assess as L or XL complexity

evals.name: dependency-analysis
evals.prompt: 分析任务依赖: [实现登录功能, 编写登录测试, 更新登录文档]

assertions.name: identifies_test_dependency
assertions.description: Should identify test depends on implementation
assertions.check: output.includes('依赖') || output.includes('depend') || output.includes('→') || output.includes('顺序')

assertions.name: identifies_doc_dependency
assertions.description: Should identify doc depends on feature

evals.name: agent-allocation
evals.prompt: 分配 Agent: 后端 API 开发任务

assertions.name: allocates_backend_agent
assertions.description: Should allocate backend-architect or similar agent

evals.name: agent-allocation-frontend
evals.prompt: 分配 Agent: Flutter UI 开发任务

assertions.name: allocates_mobile_agent
assertions.description: Should allocate mobile-developer or similar agent

evals.name: yaml-output-format
evals.prompt: 生成任务列表 YAML 格式: 用户认证功能

assertions.name: has_required_fields
assertions.description: Should have id, title, complexity fields

evals.name: execution-order-generation
evals.prompt: 生成执行顺序: [API 设计, 数据库迁移, 服务实现, 集成测试]

assertions.name: shows_execution_order
assertions.check: output.includes('执行') || output.includes('order') || output.includes('顺序') || output.includes('→')

assertions.name: correct_dependency_order
assertions.check: output.indexOf('API') < output.indexOf('实现') || output.indexOf('设计') < output.indexOf('实现')

evals.name: test-task-inclusion
evals.prompt: 分解任务: 用户注册功能 (include_tests=true)

evals.name: deliverables-identification
evals.prompt: 识别交付物: 添加 OTP 登录功能

assertions.name: includes_migration
assertions.description: Should include database migration for OTP
